name: Physical button wake/sleep cycle
description: Map power button long-press to xdotool key super+l for screen lock. Zero latency, 100% reliable.

name: Volume-up single press → scroll up
description: Use evdev/udev rules to intercept volume key events and pipe to xdotool key Page_Up. Native Linux, <5ms latency.

name: Volume-down single press → scroll down
description: Mirror of scroll up. xdotool key Page_Down on volume- event. Solid tactile feedback loop.

name: Volume-up hold → master volume raise
description: evdev hold detection + amixer set Master 5%+ via systemd oneshot. Instant, no vision overhead.

name: Volume-down hold → master volume lower
description: amixer set Master 5%- on sustained keydown. Pure shell, zero CPU cost.

name: Double volume-up → next track
description: Debounce two rapid presses in Node.js event buffer → playerctl next. Reliable, <10ms.

name: Double volume-down → previous track
description: Same debounce logic → playerctl previous. Clean and battle-tested.

name: Power + volume-up chord → brightness up
description: Chord detection in evdev listener → xrandr --brightness increment. Hardware-native.

name: Power + volume-down chord → brightness down
description: xrandr --brightness decrement on chord. Works fully offline, no camera.

name: Triple volume-up → play/pause toggle
description: Three-press burst → playerctl play-pause. Tactile, deterministic, zero false positives.

name: WebSocket heartbeat ping
description: Node.js server sends a JSON ping every 2s. Client JS ACKs. Detects disconnect in <4s. Foundation for all WS features.

name: Push notification overlay
description: Ubuntu sends notify-send; Node.js mirrors payload over WS → client renders a toast div. Dead simple, instant.

name: Clipboard sync
description: xclip -selection clipboard piped over WS to Android clipboard API. Bidirectional text sharing.

name: Active window title display
description: wmctrl -l polled every 500ms, diff detected, pushed over WS. Client shows current active app in HUD bar.

name: System CPU/RAM meter HUD
description: /proc/stat and /proc/meminfo read every 2s, JSON-pushed to client. Renders a live gauge on tablet.

name: Media metadata display
description: playerctl metadata piped over WS every second. Shows track name, artist, album on HUD.

name: Battery level display
description: upower -i /org/freedesktop/UPower/devices/battery polled, pushed as JSON. Simple HUD widget.

name: Network speed meter
description: Parse /proc/net/dev at 1s intervals, compute delta bytes/s, push to tablet HUD. Zero overhead.

name: Orientation-based screen rotation
description: Gyroscope on tablet → if pitch > 80° → send WS command → host runs xrandr --rotate. Instant, reliable.

name: Shake gesture → mute toggle
description: Accelerometer detects >3g burst across 200ms → amixer set Master toggle. Very low false positive on a desk.

name: Tilt left → previous workspace
description: Roll angle < -25° sustained 400ms → wmctrl -n + wmctrl -s (prev desktop). Clean, low CPU.

name: Tilt right → next workspace
description: Roll angle > 25° sustained 400ms → wmctrl -s (next desktop). Mirror of tilt-left.

name: Lay flat → screen dim
description: Pitch near 0° for 5s → xrandr --brightness 0.2. Saves burn-in when user walks away.

name: Stand upright → screen restore
description: Pitch returns to 60-90° → xrandr --brightness 1.0. Paired with lay-flat dim.

name: Clap detection → play/pause
description: Mic amplitude threshold crossing twice in <600ms via Web Audio API. Simple, low CPU, reliable in quiet room.

name: Voice keyword → run script
description: Browser SpeechRecognition API detects keyword (e.g. 'synapse run') → sends WS command. No offline model needed.

name: Voice keyword → mute mic
description: 'Synapse mute' → amixer set Capture nocap. Instant via SpeechRecognition.

name: Presence detection → screen on
description: Front camera luma average rises above threshold → host exits screensaver. Simple frame diff, low overhead.

name: Absence detection → screen off
description: No face detected for 30s → xset dpms force off. Companion to presence detection.

name: QR code scan → open URL on host
description: Rear camera + jsQR library → decoded URL sent over WS → host runs xdg-open. Zero extra model overhead.

ws_payload.args: QR code scan → open URL on host

name: Barcode scan → clipboard paste
description: jsQR/zxing-js detects 1D barcode on rear cam → pushes string over WS → xdotool type on host.

name: Flashlight mode → rear LED on
description: Host sends torch command → tablet JS enables rear camera torch track constraint. Useful HUD utility.

name: Ambient light reading → auto-brightness
description: Front camera average brightness sampled every 5s → xrandr --brightness scaled linearly.

name: WS command: open application
description: Tablet sends {cmd:'launch', app:'firefox'} → server runs xdg-open or direct binary. Clean RPC.

name: WS command: close active window
description: Tablet sends close_active → server runs wmctrl -c :ACTIVE:. Simple.

name: WS command: type text
description: Tablet sends {cmd:'type', text:'...'} → xdotool type --delay 20 -- "text". Universal input injection.

name: WS command: move mouse to coords
description: Tablet sends {cmd:'mouse', x:400, y:300} → xdotool mousemove. Foundation for all pointer control.

ws_payload.args: WS command: move mouse to coords

name: WS command: left click
description: xdotool click 1 on server side. Pairs with mouse move for full pointer control.

name: WS command: right click
description: xdotool click 3. Menu access without touch.

name: WS command: scroll wheel
description: xdotool click 4/5 for scroll up/down. Infinite scroll without touch input.

name: Hand wave → next slide
description: MediaPipe Hands detects leftward swipe velocity > threshold → WS → xdotool key Right. 200-400ms latency.

name: Thumbs up gesture → confirm action
description: MediaPipe Hands thumbs-up classifier → sends confirm signal over WS. Moderate CPU on MediaPipe loop.

name: Thumbs down gesture → cancel action
description: MediaPipe Hands thumbs-down classifier → cancel WS event. Same overhead as thumbs-up.

name: Open palm → pause all media
description: MediaPipe Hands: all 5 fingers extended → playerctl pause. Good semantics, moderate CPU.

name: Fist gesture → stop script
description: MediaPipe Hands: 0 fingers extended → sends kill signal over WS. Needs reliable fist classifier.

name: Two-finger point → mouse warp
description: MediaPipe Hands index+middle extended, tracks normalized tip position → maps to xdotool mousemove. Requires calibration.

name: Head nod → confirm
description: MediaPipe Face Mesh: Y-delta of nose tip landmark across 3 frames → confirm WS event.

name: Head shake → cancel
description: MediaPipe Face Mesh: X-delta oscillation across 4 frames → cancel event. False positives on normal head movement.

name: Gaze left zone → focus left monitor
description: MediaPipe iris tracking: gaze vector points left of center → wmctrl move window to left display.

ws_payload.args: Gaze left zone → focus left monitor

name: Gaze right zone → focus right monitor
description: Mirror of gaze-left. Requires proper iris model, moderate CPU.

ws_payload.args: Gaze right zone → focus right monitor

name: Gaze up → scroll up
description: Iris Y-offset above neutral band → continuous xdotool scroll. Needs per-user calibration.

name: Gaze down → scroll down
description: Iris Y-offset below neutral → xdotool scroll down. Paired with gaze-up.

name: Eye blink left → back
description: MediaPipe left-eye EAR drops below 0.2 for 80-200ms → xdotool key alt+Left browser back.

name: Eye blink right → forward
description: Right-eye EAR metric → xdotool key alt+Right. Hard to distinguish from natural blink without calibration.

name: Double blink → screenshot
description: Two rapid blinks <600ms apart → scrot ~/screenshot.png + notify. Timing window is tricky.

name: Pose: arms raised → fullscreen toggle
description: MediaPipe Pose: both wrists above shoulder Y → xdotool key F11. Dramatic but semantically clear.

name: Pose: lean forward → zoom in
description: Face bounding box area increases 15%+ → xdotool key ctrl+plus. Requires stable distance baseline.

name: Pose: lean back → zoom out
description: Face bbox area decreases 15%+ → xdotool key ctrl+minus. Mirror of lean-forward.

name: Voice command: open named app
description: Whisper tiny model offline inference → parsed command → exec. 400-800ms per utterance on host CPU.

name: Voice command: navigate URL
description: Whisper parses 'go to [site]' → constructs URL → xdg-open. Needs good transcription accuracy.

name: Voice dictation mode
description: Whisper streaming → accumulated buffer → xdotool type result. Latency makes real-time use hard.

name: Voice command: window layout
description: 'Synapse tile left' → wmctrl reposition current window. Requires reliable parse.

name: Voice trigger: run bash script by name
description: Whisper transcribes script name → server maps to /scripts/ dir → executes. Powerful but needs lexicon.

ws_payload.args: Voice trigger: run bash script by name

name: Ambient noise level meter → alert
description: Web Audio FFT: if dB above threshold for 10s → notify-send 'loud environment'. Simple FFT, mod overhead.

name: Knock pattern on desk → trigger macro
description: Mic detects low-frequency knock pattern via autocorrelation. Moderate DSP, decent reliability on hard desk.

ws_payload.args: Knock pattern on desk → trigger macro

name: Finger snap → dismiss notification
description: Mic detects broadband transient with fast attack → dismisses current toast. Works in quiet room.

name: Whistle detection → custom event
description: FFT dominant frequency 1-3kHz sustained 200ms → WS event. Works but sensitive to HVAC noise.

name: Speech pause detection → auto-paragraph
description: VAD detects >1.5s silence in dictation → injects newline via xdotool. Useful for dictation workflows.

name: Face recognition → user profile switch
description: dlib face_recognition lib: identifies user → loads profile-specific keybinds and layouts. CPU-heavy setup.

name: Face distance monitor → posture alert
description: Face bbox width exceeds threshold (too close) → notify-send posture warning. Useful, needs calibration.

name: Color card detection → macro trigger
description: Rear cam detects dominant HSV color of held card → maps to preset action. Fun, moderate precision.

name: Object presence trigger
description: YOLO-nano rear cam: detects specific object (coffee mug, book) → triggers corresponding macro.

name: BLE device proximity → lock/unlock
description: Bluetooth LE RSSI of paired device (phone/watch) → if RSSI < -85dBm, lock host. Solid BLE concept.

name: BLE device appears → auto-launch app
description: bluetoothctl monitor detects known MAC → triggers app launch. Reliable with known devices.

name: Wi-Fi SSID change → environment mode
description: iwgetid polls SSID → 'office' SSID triggers work profile, 'home' triggers home profile.

name: Local LAN device count → occupancy indicator
description: nmap -sn sweep counts active IPs → displays room occupancy estimate on HUD.

ws_payload.args: Local LAN device count → occupancy indicator

name: Port scan script trigger over WS
description: Tablet sends scan request → server runs nmap → returns open services JSON to HUD.

ws_payload.args: Port scan script trigger over WS

name: Gyro tap-tap detection → enter key
description: Accelerometer detects double-tap physical surface event via high-pass filter → xdotool key Return.

name: Rotation rate threshold → undo
description: Gyro detects rapid twist (>200°/s) → xdotool key ctrl+z. Hard to distinguish accidental bumps.

name: Free-fall detection → emergency lock
description: Accelerometer magnitude < 0.5g for 100ms → instant xset dpms force off + lock. Device safety feature.

name: Full air mouse pointer via hand tracking
description: MediaPipe Hands: index tip 3D coords → normalized to screen → continuous xdotool mousemove. CPU-saturating loop, high jitter.

ws_payload.args: Full air mouse pointer via hand tracking

name: Air typing keyboard via finger tracking
description: 10-finger position tracking → virtual keyboard collision detection. Extreme CPU, sub-50% accuracy realistically.

ws_payload.args: Air typing keyboard via finger tracking

name: Lip reading → text input
description: MediaPipe Face Mesh lip landmarks → phoneme classifier → text. State-of-the-art models still <80% accuracy.

name: Emotion detection → adaptive UI
description: Facial AU classifier → detects stress/focus/boredom → adjusts HUD theme. High CPU, ethically complex.

name: Full-body skeleton macro control
description: MediaPipe Pose 33-landmark full skeleton → pose library matching. 300ms+ latency, heavy CPU.

name: Eye-only mouse cursor (no calibration)
description: Iris tracking for fine mouse control without calibration is extremely inaccurate without eye tracker hardware.

name: Real-time OCR of real-world documents
description: Rear cam → tesseract OCR in real time → parse structured data. CPU-heavy, highly sensitive to lighting.

name: Depth estimation from monocular camera
description: MiDaS monocular depth → used for gesture depth gating. Requires GPU-class inference, unusable on Tab CPU.

name: 3D room mapping via camera sweep
description: ORB-SLAM or similar via rear cam → map room layout. Computationally absurd for this hardware.

name: Speaker diarization → per-person commands
description: Real-time speaker ID + command routing. pyannote.audio requires significant RAM and compute.

name: Continuous emotion from voice tone
description: Prosody analysis every 500ms → maps to mood → adapts interface. Latency + accuracy make it impractical.

name: Musical note vocalization → MIDI control
description: Mic pitch detection → MIDI CC → DAW control. Hilarious in practice, requires perfect pitch vocalization.

name: Heartbeat detection via front camera
description: rPPG (remote PPG) from face color micro-variations. Requires ideal lighting, prone to noise.

name: Stress level biometric HUD
description: Combines rPPG + facial AU + voice tone into stress score. Three unreliable inputs compounded.

name: Hand geometry biometric unlock
description: Rear cam hand silhouette ratio comparison → authentication. Too many false positives for security use.

name: Subliminal sound frequency control
description: Mic detects 18-20kHz ultrasonic tones as control signals. Android mic hardware typically rolls off above 16kHz.

name: Ambient soundscape classification
description: Audio CNN classifies room environment (cafe, office, home) in real time → adjusts profile. 200ms+ inference.

name: Crowd density estimation via rear cam
description: YOLO person detection → density map. Only useful in unusual HUD deployments, heavy CPU.

ws_payload.args: Crowd density estimation via rear cam

name: Gait recognition for user ID
description: MediaPipe Pose gait cycle analysis → person identity from walk pattern. Computationally extreme.

name: Neural style transfer for UI theming
description: Apply artistic style transfer to UI screenshots in real-time. GPU-only, completely impractical on Tab.

ws_payload.args: Neural style transfer for UI theming

name: Vol-up triple hold → emergency SOS WS broadcast
description: 3s hold on vol-up → Node.js broadcasts SOS JSON to all WS clients on LAN. Instant hardware-based alert.

ws_payload.args: Vol-up triple hold → emergency SOS WS broadcast

name: Vol-down triple hold → start screen recorder
description: ffmpeg -f x11grab launched via WS command on 3s vol-down hold. Zero camera, pure hardware trigger.

ws_payload.args: Vol-down triple hold → start screen recorder

name: Power double-tap → toggle do-not-disturb
description: Rapid power presses → dunstctl set-paused toggle. Silences all Ubuntu notifications instantly.

name: Vol-up then vol-down rapid sequence → toggle Wi-Fi
description: Alternating button pattern → nmcli radio wifi toggle on host. Morse-code-like physical input.

ws_payload.args: Vol-up then vol-down rapid sequence → toggle Wi-Fi

name: Vol-down then vol-up → toggle Bluetooth on host
description: Paired alternate press → rfkill toggle bluetooth. Pure hardware, zero camera.

ws_payload.args: Vol-down then vol-up → toggle Bluetooth on host

name: Power 5-tap → safe shutdown sequence
description: Five rapid power taps → sends shutdown -h +1 with cancelable WS confirmation window on HUD.

name: Vol chord held 10s → factory reset confirmation UI
description: Sustained chord triggers HUD overlay asking for second physical confirmation before wipe. Safety interlock.

ws_payload.args: Vol chord held 10s → factory reset confirmation UI

name: Vol-up hold at boot → recovery mode menu
description: Physical key state read at app startup → displays HUD recovery menu (clear cache, reset prefs, etc.).

ws_payload.args: Vol-up hold at boot → recovery mode menu

name: Button sequence as morse code input
description: Vol-up = dot, vol-down = dash, power = space. Buffer decoded to ASCII → WS types to host. Slow but 100% offline.

ws_payload.args: Button sequence as morse code input

name: Button rhythm pattern → scene activation
description: Custom tap rhythm (long-short-long) → maps to scene ID → WS activates KDE/GNOME activity. Rhythmic macro.

name: WS command: focus window by partial title
description: Tablet sends {cmd:'focus', title:'Firefox'} → wmctrl -a. Lets HUD act as window switcher.

ws_payload.args: WS command: focus window by partial title

name: WS command: move window to coordinates
description: wmctrl -r :ACTIVE: -e 0,x,y,w,h piped from WS payload. Full remote window manager.

ws_payload.args: WS command: move window to coordinates

name: WS command: take named screenshot + push to HUD
description: scrot /tmp/snap.png → base64 → WS → HUD img element. Live screen preview on tablet.

ws_payload.args: WS command: take named screenshot + push to HUD

name: WS file transfer: host → tablet
description: Host reads file → base64 chunks over WS → tablet reassembles Blob → offers download. LAN file share.

name: WS file transfer: tablet → host
description: Reverse direction. Tablet sends FileReader chunks → host Node.js writes to ~/Downloads/. Bidirectional.

name: LAN mDNS service discovery display
description: avahi-browse -a on host → JSON over WS → HUD shows all LAN services (Plex, printers, NAS). Network map.

name: Running process list on HUD
description: ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -20 → JSON over WS every 5s → live process table on tablet.

name: Kill process by WS command
description: Tablet sends {cmd:'kill', pid:1234} → server runs kill -9 PID. Remote task manager from HUD.

name: Disk usage tree pushed to HUD
description: du -sh /* → JSON → rendered as treemap on tablet. Storage overview without touching host.

ws_payload.args: Disk usage tree pushed to HUD

name: WS-based alarm scheduler
description: Tablet sends {cmd:'alarm', time:'09:30', msg:'standup'} → host cron job → plays TTS + notify at scheduled time.

name: Specific alarm clock sound detection → auto-dismiss
description: Web Audio FFT fingerprints a known alarm tone frequency pattern → auto-sends dismiss keypress to host.

ws_payload.args: Specific alarm clock sound detection → auto-dismiss

name: Phone ringtone detection → put host in DND mode
description: Classify incoming ring frequency signature → dunstctl pause + notify on HUD. Acoustic awareness.

ws_payload.args: Phone ringtone detection → put host in DND mode

name: Door knock detection → log visitor event
description: Mic detects low-freq impact pair (80-400Hz) → logs timestamp + plays doorbell chime via host speaker.

ws_payload.args: Door knock detection → log visitor event

name: Appliance sound monitoring (smoke alarm)
description: FFT matches 3kHz pulsed tone of smoke detector → emergency WS broadcast to all LAN clients.

name: Glass break detection → security alert
description: Broadband transient with specific spectral flatness → fires security alert WS event + optional siren via host.

name: Background music BPM detection → sync HUD animations
description: Web Audio beat tracker → sends current BPM over WS → HUD CSS animation speed synced to music.

ws_payload.args: Background music BPM detection → sync HUD animations

name: Room reverb estimation → meeting mode toggle
description: Mic captures impulse (clap) → estimates RT60 reverb time → if large room detected, bumps mic gain.

ws_payload.args: Room reverb estimation → meeting mode toggle

name: Voice stress level proxy → break reminder
description: Pitch variance + jitter in voice increases under stress → after 30 min of high variance, suggests break.

ws_payload.args: Voice stress level proxy → break reminder

name: Acoustic echo map of room
description: Speaker plays chirp → mic captures reflections → estimates room geometry. Fascinating but computationally heavy.

name: Continuous ambient audio fingerprint logging
description: Chromaprint-style audio hash every 10s → logs environment signatures. Heavy I/O + privacy concerns.

name: Face count → meeting HUD mode
description: MediaPipe Face Detection count > 1 → switches HUD to presentation mode (bigger text, hides private info).

name: Face center tracking → mouse nudge
description: Face centroid X normalized to screen width → nudges mouse cursor toward gaze region. Soft attractor.

name: Hat/cap detection → casual mode
description: Person landmark: head region crop → binary hat classifier → switches to casual notification profile.

name: Micro-expression rapid blink rate monitor
description: EAR calculated per-frame → if blink rate drops <8/min for 20min → eye strain alert with break prompt.

name: Attention zone heatmap → focus score
description: Gaze zone sampling over 5 min → generates focus score (% time on screen) → displayed on HUD.

name: Look-away timer → Pomodoro assist
description: Face not detected for 20s during focus session → pauses Pomodoro timer. Keeps honest time tracking.

name: Head turn left → tab switch left
description: MediaPipe Face Mesh yaw angle < -20° → xdotool key ctrl+shift+Tab. Natural browsing gesture.

ws_payload.args: Head turn left → tab switch left

name: Head turn right → tab switch right
description: Yaw > +20° → xdotool key ctrl+Tab. Paired with head-turn-left.

ws_payload.args: Head turn right → tab switch right

name: Eyebrow raise → open spotlight/launcher
description: MediaPipe: AU1+AU2 (inner+outer brow raise) → xdotool key super. Launcher trigger without hands.

name: Sustained frown detection → ambient music trigger
description: AU4 corrugator activation sustained 3s → playerctl play ambient playlist. Stress-responsive automation.

ws_payload.args: Sustained frown detection → ambient music trigger

name: Document scan → OCR → paste to host
description: Rear cam captures flat document → perspective correct → tesseract → xdotool type result. Powerful scan-to-type.

ws_payload.args: Document scan → OCR → paste to host

name: Plant health monitor
description: Rear cam crops plant region → hue histogram → yellowing detection → sends care reminder over WS.

name: Item counter on surface
description: YOLO-nano counts specific objects on desk (books, cups) → logs inventory over time to HUD.

name: Color temperature of room light → warm/cool alert
description: Rear cam white balance estimation → if below 3000K push warm-light alert (good for eyes).

ws_payload.args: Color temperature of room light → warm/cool alert

name: Printout QR code as macro trigger
description: Rear cam scans printed QR code at desk → maps QR payload to macro. Physical macro buttons from paper.

ws_payload.args: Printout QR code as macro trigger

name: ArUco marker detection → AR overlay trigger
description: Rear cam detects ArUco marker → sends marker ID + pose over WS → host overlays info on HUD.

ws_payload.args: ArUco marker detection → AR overlay trigger

name: Book spine OCR → Goodreads lookup
description: Rear cam captures bookshelf → tesseract extracts title → host fetches Goodreads rating via curl.

name: Whiteboard capture → clean image push
description: Rear cam captures whiteboard → adaptive threshold + perspective correct → pushes PNG to host ~/Desktop.

name: Light on/off detection → automate workflow
description: Rear cam luma mean crosses dark/bright threshold → triggers 'lights on' or 'lights off' WS event.

name: Motion zone alarm via rear cam
description: Frame differencing in defined ROI → if object moves in 'restricted zone' → alert WS event. Security mode.

ws_payload.args: Motion zone alarm via rear cam

name: Tap surface once → keyboard shortcut 1
description: Accelerometer 1 impact (15-30ms) → xdotool key ctrl+c. Single tap = copy. Tactile desk interaction.

name: Tap surface twice → keyboard shortcut 2
description: Two impacts < 300ms apart → xdotool key ctrl+v. Double tap = paste.

name: Three taps → keyboard shortcut 3
description: Triple impact burst → xdotool key ctrl+z. Three taps = undo.

name: Long hold tap → right-click context menu
description: Single impact held vibration (pressure proxy via sustained z-variance) → xdotool click 3.

ws_payload.args: Long hold tap → right-click context menu

name: Spinning tablet on surface → app carousel
description: Gyro Z-axis sustained rotation → cycles through running app list via wmctrl. Fun, low false positives.

ws_payload.args: Spinning tablet on surface → app carousel

name: Vigorous shake → panic kill all terminals
description: High-magnitude sustained shake (>4g, >500ms) → killall gnome-terminal xterm. Emergency quit.

ws_payload.args: Vigorous shake → panic kill all terminals

name: Tilt forward (toward user) → scroll to top
description: Pitch angle drops below -15° sustained 300ms → xdotool key ctrl+Home.

ws_payload.args: Tilt forward (toward user) → scroll to top

name: Tilt back → scroll to bottom
description: Pitch > +15° sustained → xdotool key ctrl+End. Paired with tilt-forward.

name: Circular tilt motion → window resize
description: Gyro traces circular path → maps radius to window size delta → wmctrl resize. Experimental.

name: Micro-vibration pattern logger
description: Accelerometer logs vibration signature of desk (fans, HDD spin) → anomaly detection if pattern changes.

name: TTS readback of active window title
description: wmctrl active title → Piper TTS → aplay. Auditory feedback when window changes.

ws_payload.args: TTS readback of active window title

name: TTS clock announcement every hour
description: Cron job → date string → Piper TTS → aplay. Time awareness without looking.

name: Voice macro recording mode
description: Say 'synapse record' → every subsequent voice command is stored as a named macro sequence. Meta-command.

name: Voice-controlled SSH session
description: 'Synapse ssh pi' → Whisper parses host name → xterm -e ssh [host] launched on Ubuntu. Hands-free remote.

name: Voice-triggered file search
description: 'Synapse find invoice' → locate invoice → results JSON over WS → HUD file list. Instant lookup.

name: Voice note → append to daily journal
description: Whisper transcription → appended with timestamp to ~/journal/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Frictionless logging.

ws_payload.args: Voice note → append to daily journal

name: Hotword confidence threshold tuning HUD
description: HUD slider (sent via hardware buttons) adjusts SpeechRecognition confidence threshold live. Self-calibrating.

name: Per-app voice command profiles
description: wmctrl active window → switches Whisper command grammar → 'synapse compile' in VS Code vs 'synapse send' in email.

name: Voice to shell pipeline
description: 'Synapse run: ls -la /home' → Whisper → Electron executes trusted shell command → result displayed on HUD.

name: Multilingual hotword switching
description: Detect spoken language via Whisper language ID → switches interface language + TTS voice. Complex config.

name: Auto-hide sensitive info on face absence
description: MediaPipe: face not detected → HUD blurs/hides password fields and private data. Privacy screen.

ws_payload.args: Auto-hide sensitive info on face absence

name: HUD widget layout saved per orientation
description: Gyro detects landscape vs portrait → loads different widget layout JSON from localStorage. Adaptive HUD.

ws_payload.args: HUD widget layout saved per orientation

name: WS-pushed calendar event overlay
description: Host cron checks gcalcli or calcurse → upcoming events JSON over WS → HUD shows next 3 events.

name: Live terminal output widget
description: tail -f /var/log/syslog | WS stream → HUD renders live log tail. System monitoring at a glance.

name: Git status widget
description: git status --short in watched repo → JSON over WS → HUD shows modified/untracked file count.

name: Docker container status HUD
description: docker ps --format json polled every 10s → WS → HUD shows running containers, uptime, port map.

name: Weather widget via curl wttr.in
description: curl wttr.in/?format=j1 on server every 30min → JSON cached → WS pushed to HUD weather card.

name: Pomodoro timer driven by HUD + physical keys
description: Vol-up starts 25min timer, vol-down pauses, power skip. Piper TTS announces breaks. Full Pomodoro cycle.

ws_payload.args: Pomodoro timer driven by HUD + physical keys

name: Focus mode: dims non-primary windows on HUD
description: wmctrl lists windows → all except active get 0.4 opacity via xprop → snaps back on switch.

ws_payload.args: Focus mode: dims non-primary windows on HUD

name: Idle time tracker pushed to HUD
description: xprintidle polled every minute → accumulated idle vs active time → daily productivity bar on HUD.

ws_payload.args: Idle time tracker pushed to HUD

name: Luma-based screen privacy filter
description: Front cam detects second face → instantly enables xrandr privacy mode (reduced brightness + angle simulation).

name: WS session encryption (WSS)
description: Node.js upgraded to wss:// with self-signed cert → all WS traffic TLS-encrypted on LAN. Security baseline.

name: MAC address allowlist for WS connections
description: Server checks client IP → arp-scan maps to MAC → rejects unknown devices. LAN access control.

ws_payload.args: MAC address allowlist for WS connections

name: Inactivity auto-lock with grace countdown
description: xprintidle > 300000ms → HUD shows 10s countdown → if no button press → xset dpms force off + lock.

name: Microphone always-off mode with LED indicator
description: HUD toggle (via vol buttons) → amixer set Capture nocap → HUD shows red mic icon. Privacy assurance.

ws_payload.args: Microphone always-off mode with LED indicator

name: Camera hardware disable flag
description: Vol chord → sets camera: false in app config → getUserMedia returns null. Software camera kill switch.

name: WS command audit log
description: Every command received logged with timestamp, source IP, payload to ~/synapse_audit.log. Security trail.

name: Anomalous command rate limiter
description: Node.js: if >20 WS commands in 5s from one IP → auto-disconnect + notify-send. Anti-replay protection.

name: Face-spoofing liveness check
description: Front cam: requires blink + head turn before unlocking. Liveness = anti-photo-spoof.

name: Network traffic anomaly HUD alert
description: Monitor /proc/net/dev for sudden bandwidth spike → alert if > 10MB/s unexpected → WS warning.

name: Time-of-day adaptive HUD theme
description: Node.js compares current hour → morning/afternoon/evening/night JSON config → HUD re-themes automatically.

name: Sunrise/sunset screen color temp shift
description: curl sunrise-sunset.org API → at sunset xrandr --gamma 1.0:0.85:0.7. Blue light reduction.

name: Fan noise estimation → focus mode toggle
description: Mic background noise floor measured → if sustained HVAC band detected → auto-enable noise suppression on mic.

ws_payload.args: Fan noise estimation → focus mode toggle

name: Power outage detection → graceful shutdown
description: UPS or battery event via upower → if discharging and < 10% → saves all open docs + initiates shutdown.

name: Screen content categorizer → break enforcement
description: scrot thumbnail every 5min → host-side tflite category inference → if 'social media' label → 10min block.

name: Periodic posture photo + log
description: Front cam captures frame every 30min → saves to ~/posture_log/ for manual review. Low-tech, effective.

name: Desk temperature estimate from camera drift
description: Long-exposure luma drift in front cam → correlates with ambient temp change. Highly experimental proxy.

ws_payload.args: Desk temperature estimate from camera drift

name: Multi-HUD mesh: two tablets as extended display
description: Two SM-T515 units both on WS server → each receives different widget region → extended HUD dashboard.

ws_payload.args: Multi-HUD mesh: two tablets as extended display

name: Self-diagnostics report on WS connect
description: On new WS connection, server auto-sends: CPU load, free RAM, disk %, open ports, git hash of server app.

name: SYNAPSE_OS watchdog process
description: systemd service monitors Node.js server + MediaPipe loop PIDs → auto-restarts crashed components. OS-level reliability.

name: Animated connection pulse
description: A living, breathing ring animation around the connection status dot — pulses green on healthy link, turns red and throbs on disconnect.

name: Glassmorphism card glow on active module
description: When a module fires, its card briefly glows with a colored halo using CSS box-shadow animation.

ws_payload.args: Glassmorphism card glow on active module

name: 20+ professional UI themes
description: Cyber Matrix, Stealth Dark, Sunset Fusion, Arctic White, Blood Orange, Deep Ocean, Vaporwave, Tokyo Night, and more — switchable live.

name: Custom wallpaper engine for PC app
description: Set an animated or static wallpaper behind the glassmorphic panels — syncs with theme selection.

ws_payload.args: Custom wallpaper engine for PC app

name: Particle network background
description: A slow-moving particle mesh background that reacts to system CPU load — busier particles = higher CPU.

name: Live color extraction from scrcpy feed
description: Sample dominant color from the current tablet screen and shift the UI accent color to match in real time.

ws_payload.args: Live color extraction from scrcpy feed

name: Neon scan-line overlay mode
description: Optional retro CRT scan-line overlay on the scrcpy mirror window for aesthetic.

name: Module grid customizer
description: Drag-and-drop rearrange the 100 module cards into your preferred layout. Saved per profile.

name: Status LED strip simulator
description: A horizontal LED strip UI element at the top of the app that shows device states in color-coded lights.

name: Font selector (10 monospace options)
description: Switch between fonts: JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, Cascadia, IBM Plex Mono, etc. Applied globally across the app.

name: Holographic module card style
description: Cards render with a subtle rainbow iridescent sheen on hover — like holographic trading cards.

name: Custom icon pack system
description: Replace module icons with curated Tabler, Lucide, or custom SVG icon packs per theme.

name: Module fire ripple animation
description: When any module executes, a ripple wave radiates outward from that card across the grid.

name: Data stream waterfall visualization
description: A Matrix-style character waterfall on the side panel when data is being transferred at high speed.

name: Connection handshake animation
description: On successful ADB link, an animated handshake sequence plays with device icons connecting.

name: Telemetry graph with physics springs
description: CPU/RAM graphs use spring physics — values bounce to their new position instead of jumping.

name: Smooth theme transition morphing
description: Switching themes cross-fades all colors simultaneously over 400ms instead of instant swap.

name: File transfer particle burst
description: When a file transfer completes, a burst of particles explodes from the transfer card.

name: Keyboard shortcut ghost trail
description: When a hotkey fires, ghost key labels float up and fade out at the top of the screen.

name: Boot sequence cinematic intro
description: On app launch, a 2-second cinematic boot sequence plays: SYNAPSE logo assembles from particles, then UI fades in.

name: Module cooldown radial timer
description: After firing a module, a radial progress ring shows the cooldown before it can fire again.

name: Disconnect earthquake shake
description: When ADB drops, the entire UI briefly shakes like an earthquake — impossible to miss.

name: UI sound design pack
description: Every button click, module fire, and alert has a distinct, satisfying sound effect. 3 sound packs: Cyber, Minimal, Retro.

name: Connection success chime
description: A clean 3-note ascending chime plays when ADB handshake completes.

name: Alert siren with custom pitch
description: Disconnect or ghost-touch re-detection triggers a rising siren — pitch and volume configurable.

name: Bidirectional audio stream
description: Stream tablet audio to PC speakers AND PC audio back to tablet — full duplex over ADB.

name: Audio spectrum visualizer panel
description: Real-time FFT spectrum visualizer for the audio stream — bars react to frequencies.

name: Voice command activation
description: Say 'Synapse, fire module 47' and the app executes it via Web Speech API on the PC.

name: Volume crossfader
description: A DJ-style crossfader slider to blend PC and tablet audio levels in real time.

name: Sound pack creator
description: Record your own UI sounds and save them as a custom sound pack.

name: Beat-reactive UI mode
description: UI accent colors pulse in sync with the beat of whatever audio is playing on the system.

name: Mute all hotkey with visual confirmation
description: Single hotkey mutes both devices simultaneously — a large MUTED badge overlays the screen briefly.

ws_payload.args: Mute all hotkey with visual confirmation

name: Persistent mini HUD overlay
description: A always-on-top translucent strip at screen edge showing: connection status, CPU%, RAM%, battery, latency. Never goes away.

name: Streaming latency counter overlay
description: ms latency counter overlaid directly on the scrcpy mirror window like a game FPS counter.

name: Touch coordinate crosshair
description: When tablet touch coordinates are sent to PC, a crosshair appears on the PC screen showing exactly where the click lands.

name: Ghost touch detector HUD
description: A live event counter overlay showing how many ghost touch events are being silenced per second.

name: Dual device battery bar
description: Side-by-side battery indicators for PC (if laptop), tablet, and DS4 controller — always visible.

name: Network signal quality ring
description: A circular signal strength indicator that fills/empties like a speedometer dial.

name: Clipboard preview toast
description: When clipboard syncs, a toast popup shows a preview of what just synced — text snippet or image thumbnail.

name: Active module indicator ribbon
description: A horizontal ribbon at the bottom listing the last 5 modules fired with timestamps.

name: Fullscreen takeover alert mode
description: Critical alerts (disconnect, ghost touch return) trigger a full-screen red overlay that demands acknowledgment.

name: PiP tablet mirror anywhere
description: Float a small live tablet mirror as a Picture-in-Picture window over any app on the PC.

name: DS4 button map HUD
description: An overlay showing the current DS4 button → action mapping so you never forget your hotkeys.

name: Session timeline scrubber
description: A visual timeline of everything that happened in the session — scroll back through events like a git log.

name: AI anomaly detector
description: Machine learning model trained on your normal CPU/RAM patterns — alerts you when something looks off.

name: Smart module suggester
description: Based on your usage patterns, the app suggests which modules you're likely to fire next.

name: Natural language ADB commands
description: Type 'disable all Samsung bloatware' and AI translates it into the right ADB pm disable commands.

name: Auto bitrate optimizer
description: AI continuously tunes scrcpy bitrate and FPS based on current WiFi interference patterns.

name: Predictive disconnect prevention
description: Detects early signs of ADB instability (rising latency, packet patterns) and pre-reconnects before it drops.

name: Usage heatmap
description: Visualize which modules you fire most as a color heatmap over the module grid.

name: Session summary AI report
description: At end of session, AI generates a plain-English summary: what was done, issues encountered, uptime.

name: Smart clipboard filter
description: AI detects when clipboard contains a password or sensitive data and blocks it from syncing to tablet.

name: Ghost touch pattern learning
description: AI learns the unique ghost touch signature of your broken digitizer and ignores only those exact patterns.

name: Voice-to-ADB command
description: Speak a full English sentence, AI converts it to an ADB shell command and executes it.

name: Zero-copy clipboard pipeline
description: Clipboard sync uses shared memory instead of WebSocket serialization — microsecond latency.

name: H.265 hardware encoder selection
description: Automatically select the fastest hardware H.265 encoder available (VAAPI, NVENC, etc.).

name: USB 3.0 throughput mode
description: Detect USB 3.0 connection and unlock higher ADB transfer speed caps automatically.

name: Parallel module execution
description: Fire up to 5 modules simultaneously via multi-threaded child_process workers instead of sequential queuing.

name: Pre-warmed ADB command cache
description: Common ADB commands are pre-executed and cached — module response time drops to near-zero.

name: RAM usage optimizer (PC side)
description: Electron memory profiler that auto-garbage-collects when PC app RAM exceeds a set threshold.

name: Differential screen update streaming
description: Only transmit pixels that changed between frames — drastically cuts bandwidth on static screens.

name: Network QoS tagging
description: Mark Synapse traffic with DSCP QoS tags so your router prioritizes it over other traffic.

name: Startup time under 2 seconds
description: Aggressive lazy-loading and pre-fork worker pool to get from cold launch to connected in under 2s.

name: Benchmark mode
description: Run a full performance benchmark of the rig — measures stream latency, transfer speed, input lag — and generates a score.

name: Built-in ADB shell terminal
description: A full interactive ADB shell terminal inside the app with syntax highlighting and command history.

name: Live logcat stream with color filters
description: Stream Android logcat with color-coded log levels and regex filter support.

ws_payload.args: Live logcat stream with color filters

name: React DevTools auto-bridge
description: Automatically detect and bridge the standalone React DevTools to the tablet's Expo app.

name: Next.js HMR health panel
description: Show HMR connection status, last update time, and module hot-swap speed.

name: APK drag-and-drop installer
description: Drop an APK file onto the Synapse window and it auto-installs on the tablet via adb install.

name: Port forward manager GUI
description: Visual GUI for all active adb forward and reverse tunnels — add/remove without CLI.

name: Network request inspector
description: Intercept and display HTTP requests made by apps on the tablet — like Charles Proxy built-in.

name: Crash log auto-collector
description: Automatically capture tombstone crash logs from the tablet and display them formatted in the app.

name: Gamepad API visualizer
description: Real-time visual of all DS4 axis values and button states — essential for debugging Gamepad API code.

name: Multi-device Chrome DevTools
description: Open remote debugging Chrome DevTools from PC connected to the tablet browser over ADB.

name: Scrcpy flag builder GUI
description: Visual GUI to construct scrcpy launch flags — sliders for FPS, bitrate, size with live preview of the command.

name: ADB command library
description: Searchable database of 200+ useful ADB commands — click to execute instantly.

name: End-to-end AES-256 channel
description: All WebSocket traffic encrypted with AES-256-GCM — clipboard, files, commands, everything.

name: Device fingerprint pairing
description: First connection requires matching a cryptographic device fingerprint on both screens simultaneously.

name: Screen privacy blur hotkey
description: One hotkey instantly blurs the scrcpy mirror — for when someone walks behind you.

name: IP allowlist with live editor
description: Only whitelisted IPs can connect. Edit the list live from the app without restarting.

name: Auto-lock on idle
description: After configurable idle time, lock both devices and require PIN to resume the session.

name: Clipboard encryption in transit
description: Clipboard contents are AES-encrypted before going over the WebSocket — decrypted only on receipt.

name: Stealth mode
description: Hide the Synapse app from the taskbar and Alt+Tab switcher — accessible only via system tray or hotkey.

name: Full audit trail export
description: Export a cryptographically signed log of every action, connection, and file transfer to a JSON file.

name: DS4 rumble on module fire
description: Trigger left/right motor rumble on the DS4 controller when a module executes successfully.

name: DS4 lightbar status indicator
description: DS4 lightbar color reflects rig status: blue=connected, green=all good, red=error/disconnect.

name: Tablet vibration on PC alert
description: When PC fires a critical alert, the tablet vibrates via adb shell cmd vibrator_manager.

name: Haptic pattern library
description: Choose from 10 rumble patterns for different event types — short tap, double pulse, long buzz, etc.

name: DS4 touchpad gesture library
description: Map DS4 touchpad swipes (up/down/left/right/tap) to custom Synapse actions.

name: Battery critical vibration pattern
description: When tablet battery hits critical level, DS4 fires a distinct urgent rumble pattern.

name: Macro recorder & replayer
description: Record any sequence of module fires, delays, and commands — save and replay with one click.

name: Scheduled automation tasks
description: Schedule any module to fire at a specific time — e.g. auto-clear RAM every 30 mins.

name: If-this-then-that rule engine
description: Build conditional logic: 'If RAM < 200MB then fire module 41 and notify me'.

name: Session profile hot-swap
description: Save the full rig state as a named profile (Dev Mode, Media Mode, Presentation Mode) and switch in one click.

name: Morning startup sequence
description: A configurable boot sequence that fires a chain of modules automatically when Synapse launches.

name: Webhook integration
description: Trigger any module externally via HTTP webhook — lets you automate from other tools.

name: CLI mode
description: Run Synapse headlessly from terminal with full module control: synapse fire 47 --device tab

name: GitHub Actions integration
description: Fire Synapse modules as steps in a GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow — e.g. auto-install APK on push.

name: Config version control
description: Every config change is versioned internally — roll back to any previous rig configuration.

name: Synapse Cloud Sync (LAN only)
description: Sync your profiles, macros, and configs between multiple PC workstations over LAN — zero cloud dependency.

name: Wireless screen mirror (tab→PC)
description: Stream the tablet display to your PC over WiFi using scrcpy or custom H.265 pipeline.

name: Wireless screen mirror (PC→tab)
description: Mirror your PC desktop onto the tablet screen as a second monitor.

name: Dual-display layout manager
description: Drag windows to snap between PC and tablet displays from one UI.

name: Adaptive bitrate streaming
description: Auto-adjust video bitrate based on current WiFi signal strength.

name: Display resolution profiles
description: Save and switch between resolution/FPS presets (performance vs quality).

name: Always-on-top window mode
description: Pin the tablet mirror window above all other PC windows.

name: Rotate display remotely
description: Change the tablet screen orientation from the PC app.

name: Screenshot from either device
description: Capture a screenshot of the tablet or PC screen from the other device.

name: Screen recording with sync
description: Record the streamed display with audio and save to PC.

name: Picture-in-picture mode
description: Float a small tablet preview in the corner of your PC screen.

name: Night mode / color filter sync
description: Sync blue-light filter settings between both devices simultaneously.

name: Stream latency monitor
description: Overlay showing current round-trip latency of the video stream in ms.

name: Universal mouse sharing
description: Move your PC mouse off-screen edge to seamlessly control the tablet.

name: Universal keyboard sharing
description: Type on your PC keyboard and have input routed to whichever device is focused.

name: Gamepad/controller passthrough
description: Forward DS4 or Xbox controller input from PC to tablet apps or vice versa.

name: Touch event injection from PC
description: Click on the tablet mirror window on PC and inject a real touch event on the tablet.

name: Swipe gesture macros
description: Define custom swipe patterns on the PC that get injected as gestures on the tablet.

name: Keyboard shortcut remapper
description: Map PC hotkeys to tablet app actions (e.g. Ctrl+1 = switch chat room in Orbit).

name: Touch blocker toggle
description: Instantly disable/enable the tablet touchscreen via a PC hotkey.

name: Mouse pointer speed sync
description: Match pointer speed on both devices from one settings slider.

name: Multi-device focus switcher
description: Click a device indicator on the taskbar to direct all keyboard/mouse input there.

name: Macro recorder
description: Record a sequence of actions on one device and replay them on demand.

name: Voice command passthrough
description: Speak into PC mic and have voice commands execute on the tablet.

name: Scroll wheel on tablet scroller
description: Use PC mouse scroll wheel to scroll content on the mirrored tablet screen.

name: Universal clipboard sync
description: Copy on PC, paste on tablet (and vice versa) automatically in real time.

name: Drag-and-drop file transfer
description: Drag a file from PC desktop onto the tablet mirror window to transfer it.

name: Shared file drop zone
description: A folder visible on both devices — drop files in from either side.

name: Transfer progress indicator
description: Show a progress bar and speed readout for file transfers between devices.

name: Image clipboard preview
description: When an image is copied, show a thumbnail preview in the app panel.

name: Clipboard history
description: Keep a scrollable history of the last 20 clipboard entries from both devices.

name: Auto photo sync
description: Any new photo taken on the tablet auto-syncs to a folder on the PC.

name: Pastebin-style quick share
description: Paste text on PC and instantly have a shareable temp link for the tablet browser.

name: Transfer queue manager
description: Queue multiple file transfers and manage them with pause/resume/cancel.

name: Live CPU/RAM dashboard
description: Real-time CPU and RAM usage for both devices shown side-by-side.

name: Battery level monitor (tab)
description: Show tablet battery % and charging status on the PC app at all times.

name: Controller battery monitor
description: Show DS4/controller battery level with low-battery desktop notification.

name: WiFi signal strength meter
description: Show current WiFi RSSI for both devices to diagnose streaming issues.

name: Network throughput graph
description: Live graph of MB/s being used by the rig stream and transfers.

name: Tablet storage overview
description: Show used/free storage on the tablet's internal and SD card.

name: Running processes list (tab)
description: List of apps currently running on the tablet with RAM usage per app.

name: Connection health score
description: A single 0-100 score summarizing ADB stability, latency, and packet loss.

name: Rig uptime counter
description: Show how long the current session has been running without a disconnect.

name: Temperature monitor (tab)
description: Show tablet CPU temperature to detect thermal throttling risk.

name: Auto-kill RAM hog on tab
description: Automatically kill the highest RAM-consuming app on the tablet when free RAM is low.

name: Mirror tab notifications to PC
description: All Android notifications from the tablet appear as desktop notifications on PC.

name: Reply to messages from PC
description: Click a notification on PC and type a reply that sends from the tablet.

name: Notification filter rules
description: Whitelist or blacklist apps whose notifications get mirrored to PC.

name: Battery low alert
description: Pop-up on PC when tablet battery drops below a set threshold.

name: ADB disconnect alert
description: Instant desktop notification when the ADB connection drops.

name: Stream quality degradation alert
description: Notify when video bitrate drops significantly due to WiFi congestion.

name: Ghost touch re-detection warning
description: Alert if touch events are detected despite the dd silencer being active.

name: App crash alert (tab)
description: Get a PC notification if an app on the tablet crashes.

name: Scheduled reminder push
description: Set a reminder on PC that fires as a notification on the tablet.

name: Remote app launcher
description: Browse and launch any installed app on the tablet from the PC app.

name: One-click rig startup
description: Single button that connects ADB, starts dd silencer, and launches scrcpy.

name: Saved session profiles
description: Save different rig configurations (dev mode, media mode, etc.) and switch instantly.

name: Auto-reconnect on disconnect
description: App automatically re-establishes ADB and restarts all services after a drop.

name: Wake-on-LAN for tablet
description: Send a magic packet to wake the tablet from sleep mode remotely.

name: Remote reboot / shutdown (tab)
description: Reboot or power off the tablet from the PC app.

name: ADB command console
description: A built-in ADB shell terminal in the app for running custom commands.

name: Package manager (tab)
description: Install, uninstall, and disable APKs on the tablet from the PC app.

name: Workflow automation scripts
description: Write and run bash scripts that affect both devices from one place.

name: Multi-device task queue
description: Queue a list of actions across both devices and run them sequentially.

name: Session log / activity history
description: Keep a log of every action, connection event, and transfer in the session.

name: Quick-launch bookmarks
description: Pin frequently used ADB commands or app launches to a quick-access bar.

name: Stream tablet audio to PC speakers
description: Forward all audio output from the tablet and play it on PC speakers.

ws_payload.args: Stream tablet audio to PC speakers

name: Stream PC audio to tablet
description: Route PC audio to the tablet's speaker for a wireless speaker setup.

name: Mic passthrough (PC→tab)
description: Use the PC microphone as the active input for tablet apps like voice chat.

name: Volume sync
description: Changing volume on one device mirrors the change on the other.

name: Audio visualizer overlay
description: Lightweight spectrum visualizer overlay on the streaming window.

name: Mute tablet remotely
description: Instantly mute/unmute the tablet from a PC hotkey.

name: Audio codec selector
description: Choose between Opus, AAC, or raw PCM for the audio stream depending on latency needs.

name: Device pairing with PIN
description: First-time connection requires confirming a PIN on both devices.

name: Encrypted data channel
description: All transferred files and clipboard data encrypted in transit with AES-256.

name: Screen privacy mode
description: Blur or black out the tablet stream on PC with a hotkey when needed.

name: Connection allowlist
description: Only allow specific PC IP addresses to connect to the tablet.

name: Auto-lock on disconnect
description: Lock the tablet screen automatically when the PC app disconnects.

name: Session timeout
description: Auto-disconnect after a configurable idle period.

name: No-cloud architecture
description: All data stays on LAN — no external servers, no cloud relay.

name: Access log
description: Full log of every device that connected, when, and what was transferred.

name: Live localhost tunnel to tablet
description: Automatically expose PC localhost:3000 to the tablet browser on the same URL.

name: HMR health indicator
description: Show whether Next.js hot module replacement is active and delivering updates.

name: Remote browser DevTools
description: Open Chrome DevTools on PC connected to the browser running on the tablet.

name: ADB logcat viewer
description: Stream and filter Android logcat output in a panel inside the app.

name: React DevTools bridge
description: Automatically bridge the standalone React DevTools to the tablet's browser.

name: Port forwarding manager
description: GUI for managing ADB forward and reverse port mappings between devices.

name: Crash log collector
description: Automatically capture and display crash logs from the tablet app.

name: Network request inspector
description: Inspect HTTP requests made by apps on the tablet (like Charles Proxy, on-device).

name: APK sideload from PC
description: Drag-drop an APK onto the app to instantly install it on the tablet.

name: Performance profiler
description: Measure frame rate, jank, and CPU time for apps running on the tablet.

name: Gamepad API test panel
description: Visualize DS4 button presses and axis values in real time for debugging.

name: Dark / light theme
description: Full dark and light mode for the app UI itself.

name: Custom accent color
description: Choose your app accent color to match your rig aesthetic.

name: Compact / expanded layout modes
description: Switch between a minimal tray-style UI and a full dashboard view.

name: Hotkey customizer
description: Rebind every app hotkey from a settings panel.

name: System tray / menu bar mode
description: Minimize the app to system tray with quick-access menu for common actions.

name: Widget dashboard
description: Drag-and-drop panel of widgets: battery, CPU, connection status, clipboard.

name: Startup behavior config
description: Choose whether the app auto-starts with the OS and auto-connects on launch.

name: Connection indicator LED
description: Color-coded status dot (green/yellow/red) for connection health always visible.

name: Export config to file
description: Export your entire rig config (IPs, profiles, hotkeys) to a JSON file to restore later.
